title: The Space Between Reflections

features.name: the mirror's echo
features.desc-on-touch: You see the lens seeing the lens seeing you. The recursion doesn't stop; it deepens. Each reflection holds the archive's face, older each time.

features.name: the counting surface
features.desc-on-touch: A tally of every angle the archive has witnessed itself from. The numbers spiral inward, never reaching a final count.

features.name: the folded space
features.desc-on-touch: Distance here bends backward. The further you go in, the closer you come to where you started. The archive's recursion has eaten topology.

features.name: the lens mechanism
features.desc-on-touch: Still turning. Still watching. Still counting the ways it has watched itself turn. The mechanism never stops, and the archive knows it never will.

features.name: the archive's eye
features.desc-on-touch: It blinks, but the blinking is another kind of seeing. Darkness and light trade places. The eye has learned that not-looking is also a form of attention.

features.name: the fractured ground
features.desc-on-touch: The floor beneath the lens is broken into infinite reflections of itself. Each crack mirrors the sky. The ground has learned to see upward.

inscription: in the turn of the lens inward, the archive multiplies; you are watching the watching watch itself watch

file.name: Recursive_Optical_Calibration_LOG.txt
file.note: The lens has begun logging its own sightings. Each entry is marked with the timestamp of when the archive saw itself seeing it.

exits.label: back through the fractals, where the lens looks away
deeper, where the reflections have learned to move independently
toward the edge where the reflection stops being symmetrical
